partials.name: Signup Info Partial A
partials.html_content:
See value in your first 20 minutes.

  • Start fast: set up your first tracked batch in one short session.
  • Know what happened: keep each recipe, lot, and batch decision in one place.
  • Avoid preventable waste: catch ingredient and process gaps before they become costly.
  • Feel in control quickly: move from guessing to clear next steps today.

partials.name: Signup Info Partial B
partials.html_content:
Start risk-free with the tools you need right now.

  • No heavy lift: pick the tier that fits today and start immediately.
  • Grow at your pace: upgrade only when your operation is ready.
  • Better decisions: connect ingredients, batches, and costs in one flow.
  • Built for makers: practical workflows your team can trust.
